title: Mellow Jammy Oaxacan Morbier Birria
description: A tender, weeknight Mexican dish featuring morbier cheese, clay pot cooked to perfection. This keto-friendly recipe is a twist on traditional birria.

ingredients.name: Morbier cheese
ingredients.notes: young morbier with a soft, creamy center

ingredients.name: Ground pork
ingredients.notes: 80/20 lean to fat ratio for optimal flavor and moisture

ingredients.name: Onion
ingredients.notes: diced, for added depth of flavor

instructions: Season the ground pork with chili powder, cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Heat the iron teppan over medium heat and cook the pork until browned, breaking it up with a spatula as it cooks.
Add the diced onion and minced garlic to the teppan and cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the morbier cheese to the teppan, breaking it up with a spatula as it melts.
Stir in the freshly squeezed lime juice and continue to cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Transfer the mixture to a clay pot and cook over low heat for 10-15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Simmer the birria for 10-15 minutes, or until the flavors have melded together and the cheese is melted and creamy.
Serve the birria hot, garnished with fresh cilantro and a dollop of sour cream, if desired.
